text.message: You have two devs and a great setup dude
He isn't on the wood port yet.  You have devs
If I were you I'd just be glad he chose such an ineffective block of me
It is oj who is in the lead tho
guys we've all played enough catan to know the road player isn't the block
I don't think you're the block here really, but I'm too far behind
Have tried to trade you for wood all game, but you havent taken them
ok i'll be on the lookout
The chat banning you from saying "di rty mono" is the stupidest thing
Did you not just say yes?
I'm last dude. When you extort last, you shouldn't expect to get it
You just happened to say yes
Ok I'm done talking in this game I think
just used all road building material
Think I need to fight oj for army
For us to stand a chance
I have so many knights.  You ain't winning army
Any wheat trades for a dev?
Then you asked for nb lol
How on earth do you think its me oj?
This is your game to throw
You keep hitting me.  I'm going to respond
It's not my game to throw unless I pull rb
Again, your game to throw. You are doing well here lol. I'm not
The 4 is such a bad block lol
I have to pull 4 vps or a rb.  It's not looking good
Very possible with your setup lol
I'm trying but when my 6 is soloed I cant
Don't solo me so much if you don't want me to respond
Thought it was impossible to get
To be fair, I view blue as more dangerous than oj here
Because if you have two vps than Oj has max one
Blue either has two or vp mono
oh yeah im gonna build 5 roads now
Or two settles or settle city
Easy path to win is my points
It's prob in your interest to tell us your devs here blue
I don't want to give people info on whether they should pop or not
Well, no one can pop now
I'm not in a great position, though
I'm not the one with the vps
So, 1 vp, 1 knight a yop and an rb?
I have to city, settle, road road settle
You have good devs for it tho
But I agree that it's blue
I can plow with a trade
Port so we can block the 8
Actually a good one my dudes
gg for me if black doesnt have it here
